creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: gnome->freebsd-ports-bugs

Redirect it to freebsd-ports-bugs. marcus said, "This PR might be better 
analyzed by the nvidia module maintainer or the X people. Maybe even someone 
with syscons experience should have a look.  I do not think this is a problem 
with GDM per se."
